tools.name: holidays.getOperation
tools.description: Returns Canadian public holidays. Each holiday lists the regions that observe it.

tools.name: holidays.holiday
tools.description: Returns one Canadian statutory holiday by integer id. Returns a 404 response for invalid ids.

tools.name: info.spec
tools.description: Gets the schema for the JSON API as a yaml file.

tools.name: provinces.getOperation
tools.description: Returns provinces and territories in Canada. Each province or territory lists its associated holidays.

tools.name: provinces.province
tools.description: Returns a Canadian province or territory with its associated holidays. Returns a 404 response for invalid abbreviations.

tools.name: openapi.previewSpec
tools.description: Preview an OpenAPI document before adding it as a source

tools.name: openapi.addSource
tools.description: Add an OpenAPI source and register its operations as tools
